steps.name: Plugin metadata and discovery
criteria: Scan plugins directory for subdirs with init.lisp
Parse plugin metadata from Lisp source comments
Return list of discovered plugin metadata
Missing plugins directory returns empty list
Malformed init.lisp skipped with warning

steps.name: Plugin registry and lifecycle
criteria: Registry tracks loaded plugins by name
Load evaluates init.lisp in Lisp runtime
Plugin init function called during load
Unload removes plugin from registry
Duplicate plugin name rejected with error

steps.name: Plugin command and hook tracking
criteria: Plugin registers commands tracked per plugin
Plugin registers hooks tracked per plugin
Unload removes all commands registered by plugin
Unload removes all hooks registered by plugin
Commands from other plugins survive unload

steps.name: Dependency ordering via topological sort
criteria: Plugins with dependencies loaded after deps
Circular dependency detected and reported
Missing dependency reported as error
Independent plugins load in discovery order
Plugin with satisfied deps loads successfully

steps.name: Wire plugin system into main and test plugin
criteria: Plugin system initialized in main before event loop
Test plugin in plugins/test-plugin/init.lisp loads
Test plugin registers a callable command
Plugin load errors display as messages
Multiple plugins can coexist independently
